TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == pinzimwan pinsba na Yesu == pinsba sku babaw rgyax kmayan Yesu maha, 1.kya ku pngsa mkzinut tninun ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; s'uli na kinhangan Kayan ku laha ! 2.kya ku mbahing kinh'ilan naha ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan musa slahaw laha! 3.kya ku mhhuway inlungan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; p'agan sinnonan Lyutux Kayan! 4.kya ku smawgan 'mubuy 'sahuy inlungan Lyutux Kayan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan psu'un may sinnawgan naha! 5.kya ku gmalu s'uli ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan pgalu laha! 6.kya ku pl'ux inlungan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la;musa mtayux Lyutux Kayan ku laha. 7.kya ku psblay ss'uli ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; musa m'la'i na Lyutux Kayan! 8.kya ku mkzinut mbetux 'mubuy 'sahuy inlungan na Lyutux Kayan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; musa s'uli na kinhangan Kayan ku laha. pinngsa pinsba na Yesu Yaba myan niya Alang Kayan, pbuziy trahu lalu su, bya'a ku klahang su, htga babaw hyan ku inlungan su, 'siy ga niya mki Alang Kayan. bi'iy samiy nni'un myan kisa haniy, swaliy ku kuhay myan ryax sawni, 'siy ga wayan myan swalan kuhay s'uli. laxiy samiy stna'iy sku kinya'ih tnalam, pshutiy samiy shri sku ya'ih na lyutux. huwa sawn ga rhyan, rngu, sinnyaxan ga isu kwara ana knwan krryax. Amen.
S.PHON: == pinzimwan pins~…ēő≤a na jes~…ēu == pins~…ēő≤a s~…ēku ő≤aő≤aw r…£jax kmajan jes~…ēu mańßa, *.kja ku pŇčs~…ēa mkzinut tninun …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; s~…ē Ēuli na kinńßaŇčan kajan ku lańßa ! *.kja ku mő≤ańßiŇč kinńß Ēilan nańßa …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan mus~…ēa s~…ēlańßaw lańßa! *.kja ku mńßńßuwaj inluŇčan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; p Ēa…£an s~…ēinnonan ljutux kajan! *.kja ku s~…ēmaw…£an Ēmuő≤uj Ēs~…ēańßuj inluŇčan ljutux kajan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan ps~…ēu Ēun maj s~…ēinnaw…£an nańßa! *.kja ku …£malu s~…ē Ēuli …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan p…£alu lańßa! *.kja ku pl Ēux inluŇčan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la;mus~…ēa mtajux ljutux kajan ku lańßa. *.kja ku ps~…ēő≤laj s~…ēs~…ē Ēuli …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; mus~…ēa m Ēla Ēi na ljutux kajan! *.kja ku mkzinut mő≤etux Ēmuő≤uj Ēs~…ēańßuj inluŇčan na ljutux kajan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; mus~…ēa s~…ē Ēuli na kinńßaŇčan kajan ku lańßa. pinŇčs~…ēa pins~…ēő≤a na jes~…ēu jaő≤a mjan nija alaŇč kajan, pő≤uzij trańßu lalu s~…ēu, ő≤ja Ēa ku klańßaŇč s~…ēu, ńßt…£a ő≤aő≤aw ńßjan ku inluŇčan s~…ēu, Ēs~…ēij …£a nija mki alaŇč kajan. ő≤i Ēij s~…ēamij nni Ēun mjan kis~…ēa ńßanij, s~…ēwalij ku kuńßaj mjan rjax s~…ēawni, Ēs~…ēij …£a wajan mjan s~…ēwalan kuńßaj s~…ē Ēuli. laxij s~…ēamij s~…ētna Ēij s~…ēku kinja Ēińß tnalam, ps~…ēńßutij s~…ēamij s~…ēńßri s~…ēku ja Ēińß na ljutux. ńßuwa s~…ēawn …£a rńßjan, rŇču, s~…ēinnjaxan …£a is~…ēu kwara ana knwan krrjax. amen.
S.FORM: == pinzimwan pinsba na Yesu == pinsba sku babaw rgyax kmayan Yesu maha, 1.kya ku pngsa mkzinut tninun ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; s'uli na kinhangan Kayan ku laha ! 2.kya ku mbahing kinh'ilan naha ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan musa slahaw laha! 3.kya ku mhhuway inlungan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; p'agan sinnonan Lyutux Kayan! 4.kya ku smawgan 'mubuy 'sahuy inlungan Lyutux Kayan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan psu'un may sinnawgan naha! 5.kya ku gmalu s'uli ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; Lyutux Kayan pgalu laha! 6.kya ku pl'ux inlungan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la;musa mtayux Lyutux Kayan ku laha. 7.kya ku psblay ss'uli ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; musa m'la'i na Lyutux Kayan! 8.kya ku mkzinut mbetux 'mubuy 'sahuy inlungan na Lyutux Kayan ga tiyalagay m'awyat la; musa s'uli na kinhangan Kayan ku laha. pinngsa pinsba na Yesu Yaba myan niya Alang Kayan, pbuziy trahu lalu su, bya'a ku klahang su, htga babaw hyan ku inlungan su, 'siy ga niya mki Alang Kayan. bi'iy samiy nni'un myan kisa haniy, swaliy ku kuhay myan ryax sawni, 'siy ga wayan myan swalan kuhay s'uli. laxiy samiy stna'iy sku kinya'ih tnalam, pshutiy samiy shri sku ya'ih na lyutux. huwa sawn ga rhyan, rngu, sinnyaxan ga isu kwara ana knwan krryax. Amen.
S.PHON: == pinzimwan pins~…ēő≤a na jes~…ēu == pins~…ēő≤a s~…ēku ő≤aő≤aw r…£jax kmajan jes~…ēu mańßa, *.kja ku pŇčs~…ēa mkzinut tninun …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; s~…ē Ēuli na kinńßaŇčan kajan ku lańßa ! *.kja ku mő≤ańßiŇč kinńß Ēilan nańßa …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan mus~…ēa s~…ēlańßaw lańßa! *.kja ku mńßńßuwaj inluŇčan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; p Ēa…£an s~…ēinnonan ljutux kajan! *.kja ku s~…ēmaw…£an Ēmuő≤uj Ēs~…ēańßuj inluŇčan ljutux kajan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan ps~…ēu Ēun maj s~…ēinnaw…£an nańßa! *.kja ku …£malu s~…ē Ēuli …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; ljutux kajan p…£alu lańßa! *.kja ku pl Ēux inluŇčan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la;mus~…ēa mtajux ljutux kajan ku lańßa. *.kja ku ps~…ēő≤laj s~…ēs~…ē Ēuli …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; mus~…ēa m Ēla Ēi na ljutux kajan! *.kja ku mkzinut mő≤etux Ēmuő≤uj Ēs~…ēańßuj inluŇčan na ljutux kajan …£a tijala…£aj m Ēawjat la; mus~…ēa s~…ē Ēuli na kinńßaŇčan kajan ku lańßa. pinŇčs~…ēa pins~…ēő≤a na jes~…ēu jaő≤a mjan nija alaŇč kajan, pő≤uzij trańßu lalu s~…ēu, ő≤ja Ēa ku klańßaŇč s~…ēu, ńßt…£a ő≤aő≤aw ńßjan ku inluŇčan s~…ēu, Ēs~…ēij …£a nija mki alaŇč kajan. ő≤i Ēij s~…ēamij nni Ēun mjan kis~…ēa ńßanij, s~…ēwalij ku kuńßaj mjan rjax s~…ēawni, Ēs~…ēij …£a wajan mjan s~…ēwalan kuńßaj s~…ē Ēuli. laxij s~…ēamij s~…ētna Ēij s~…ēku kinja Ēińß tnalam, ps~…ēńßutij s~…ēamij s~…ēńßri s~…ēku ja Ēińß na ljutux. ńßuwa s~…ēawn …£a rńßjan, rŇču, s~…ēinnjaxan …£a is~…ēu kwara ana knwan krrjax. amen.
